A company is the top level unit of organisation.
A season has a start and end and is the broadest unit of time organisation. It belongs to a company.
A season has many programmes. A programme is a smaller subset of time within a season.
A programme has a species, such as a lamb.
A week is a subset of time within a programme.
A booking is on a week and has a specific programme.
